name: Compute access note
about: Document a public compute access path, eligibility requirement, contact route, or application constraint.
title: "[Compute] "
labels: compute, needs source
assignees: ""
---

## Program or infrastructure

Name the program, site, AI Factory, EuroHPC path, IT4LIA resource, university route, or other public infrastructure.

## What needs to be documented

Describe the access path, eligibility question, application requirement, timeline, cost, or contact route.

## Public sources

Link official pages or public documents. Do not include private emails, credentials, or confidential contacts.

## Practical implication

What does this mean for Limes Labs or other open AI contributors?

## Unknowns

List questions that remain unresolved.

## Definition of done

- [ ] Public sources are linked.
- [ ] Confirmed facts are separated from assumptions.
- [ ] No private or sensitive information is included.
- [ ] Next action is clear.
